plan_name: Extract and Reconcile Quarterly Revenue Data
author: Nadia Okonkwo
goal_description: Pull revenue figures from Stripe, QuickBooks, and the internal data warehouse, cross-reference totals per region, and flag discrepancies exceeding 2%
context_description: Q4 2025 revenue reconciliation is overdue. The CFO needs a validated summary before the March 10 board meeting. Three data sources must agree within a 2% tolerance band.
constraints: Read-only access to production databases. No PII may be written to logs. All currency values normalized to USD using the ECB daily rate from December 31, 2025.

steps.name: Fetch Stripe settlements
steps.description: Retrieve all settled payouts for October–December 2025
steps.expected_output: JSON array of payout objects with amount, currency, and arrival_date
steps.fallback: Retry with exponential backoff; if Stripe API is down, use cached CSV from finance-share

steps.name: Query QuickBooks ledger
steps.description: Pull the Profit & Loss report filtered to revenue accounts 4000–4999
steps.expected_output: Tabular revenue breakdown by account and month
steps.fallback: Fall back to exported XLSX on the shared drive dated January 15, 2026

steps.name: Export warehouse totals
steps.description: Run pre-approved SQL against the analytics warehouse to get regional revenue rollups
steps.expected_output: Result set with columns: region, month, revenue_usd, transaction_count
steps.fallback: Alert data-eng on-call if warehouse is unreachable

steps.name: Normalize currencies
steps.description: Convert any non-USD amounts to USD using the ECB reference rate for December 31, 2025
steps.input: Payout and ledger rows where currency ≠ USD
steps.expected_output: Unified dataset with all amounts in USD
steps.fallback: Use hardcoded ECB rate snapshot if API is unavailable

steps.name: Cross-reference totals
steps.description: Compare Stripe vs QuickBooks vs warehouse totals per region and flag deltas above 2%
steps.input: Three normalized datasets keyed by region and month
steps.expected_output: Reconciliation matrix with match/mismatch status and delta percentages
steps.fallback: If one source is missing, produce a partial reconciliation and note the gap

steps.name: Generate summary report
steps.description: Produce a Markdown summary table suitable for the board deck with flagged discrepancies highlighted
steps.expected_output: Formatted Markdown document with executive summary, region table, and footnotes
steps.fallback: Output raw JSON if rendering fails

success_criteria: All three sources reconcile within 2% per region for every month in Q4, and a board-ready summary is generated with no unresolved flags.
failure_action: Generate a partial report noting which sources or regions failed and escalate
